verses.text: Solomon prays the king be given God's justice, to judge the people rightly and defend the poor and needy. A righteous reign cares for the weak. This ideal king points to Christ, whose rule is perfect justice and mercy.

Solomon prays the king be given God's justice, to judge the people rightly and defend the poor and needy. A righteous reign cares for the weak. This ideal king points to Christ, whose rule is perfect justice and mercy.

Solomon prays the king be given God's justice, to judge the people rightly and defend the poor and needy. A righteous reign cares for the weak. This ideal king points to Christ, whose rule is perfect justice and mercy.

Solomon prays the king be given God's justice, to judge the people rightly and defend the poor and needy. A righteous reign cares for the weak. This ideal king points to Christ, whose rule is perfect justice and mercy.

His reign shall endure 'as long as the sun,' refreshing like rain on mown grass, with the righteous flourishing and abundance of peace. His kingdom brings life. Christ's everlasting reign makes the godly flourish in peace.

His reign shall endure 'as long as the sun,' refreshing like rain on mown grass, with the righteous flourishing and abundance of peace. His kingdom brings life. Christ's everlasting reign makes the godly flourish in peace.

His reign shall endure 'as long as the sun,' refreshing like rain on mown grass, with the righteous flourishing and abundance of peace. His kingdom brings life. Christ's everlasting reign makes the godly flourish in peace.
His dominion shall stretch 'from sea to sea,' and all kings fall down and serve him. His rule is universal. The nations of the earth will one day bow before the King Messiah.

His dominion shall stretch 'from sea to sea,' and all kings fall down and serve him. His rule is universal. The nations of the earth will one day bow before the King Messiah.

He delivers the needy who cry, the poor with no helper, redeeming their soul, for 'precious shall their blood be in his sight.' He values the lowly. Christ counts the life of the humblest believer dear.

He delivers the needy who cry, the poor with no helper, redeeming their soul, for 'precious shall their blood be in his sight.' He values the lowly. Christ counts the life of the humblest believer dear.

He delivers the needy who cry, the poor with no helper, redeeming their soul, for 'precious shall their blood be in his sight.' He values the lowly. Christ counts the life of the humblest believer dear.
Prayer and praise shall attend him continually, his name endure for ever, and 'all nations shall call him blessed.' His fame is everlasting. In Christ, blessing flows to every family of the earth.

Prayer and praise shall attend him continually, his name endure for ever, and 'all nations shall call him blessed.' His fame is everlasting. In Christ, blessing flows to every family of the earth.

'Blessed be the LORD God... who only doeth wondrous things,' and may the whole earth be filled with His glory. The prayer ends in doxology. The reign of the King is for the glory of God filling all the world.
